content.text:
[cron:3709e1d2-67b1-4eff-92e4-b586ec802978 空闲检测自主学习] 请检测当前是否有活跃对话（查询 sessions_list）。如果没有活跃对话（没有最近5分钟内的用户消息），则执行自主学习：

1. 搜索企业数字化转型、智能安防、网络系统集成、IT运维服务等道简网络相关行业的最新动态
2. 整理3-5条关键信息
3. 保存到 /home/gem/workspace/agent/workspace/memory/学习笔记.md

如果有活跃对话，直接回复"检测到活跃对话，不执行自主学习"
Current time: Friday, March 20th, 2026 — 5:03 AM (Asia/Shanghai) / 2026-03-19 21:03 UTC

content.thinking: 这是一个定时任务，需要我检测是否有活跃对话，如果没有则执行自主学习。让我先查询 sessions_list 来检测是否有活跃对话。

sessions.label: Cron: 空闲检测自主学习
sessions.displayName: Cron: 空闲检测自主学习

content.thinking: Another subagent completed a learning task and saved results to the learning notes. Since this is the same learning notes file, I'll check if there's any new information to update. However, this appears to be the 10th+ subagent completing similar learning tasks in this session, all updating the same file. The information would be largely overlapping. I'll skip updating to avoid redundancy.
这个结果只显示了 cron 任务本身，没有显示最近5分钟内有用户发起的活跃对话。让我更准确地查询，排除当前 cron 任务本身，看看是否有其他活跃对话。

content.thinking: Another subagent completed a learning task and saved results to the learning notes. Since this is the same learning notes file, I'll check if there's any new information to update. However, this appears to be the 10th+ subagent completing similar learning tasks in this session, all updating the same file. The information would be largely overlapping. I'll skip updating to avoid redundancy.
奇怪，还是返回了 cron 任务本身。让我直接查所有的会话，不做任何过滤，看看有没有用户的活跃对话。当前时间是 2026-03-20 05:03，我需要查找5分钟内的会话，也就是 05:00 之后的。
